javadoc_before:
/** * Builds a new {@link DeferredFileOutputStream} instance. *

* For example: *

* 
{@code
     * DeferredFileOutputStream s = DeferredFileOutputStream.builder()
     *   .setPath(path)
     *   .setBufferSize(4096)
     *   .setDirectory(dir)
     *   .setOutputFile(outputFile)
     *   .setPrefix(prefix)
     *   .setSuffix(suffix)
     *   .setThreshold(threshold)
     *   .get();}
     *
* @since 2.12.0 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Builds a new {@link DeferredFileOutputStream} instance. *

* For example: *

* 
{@code
     * DeferredFileOutputStream s = DeferredFileOutputStream.builder()
     *   .setBufferSize(4096)
     *   .setDirectory(dir)
     *   .setOutputFile(outputFile)
     *   .setPrefix(prefix)
     *   .setSuffix(suffix)
     *   .setThreshold(threshold)
     *   .get();}
     *
*

* The only super's aspect used us buffer size. *

* * @since 2.12.0 */
